description: Clown/Jester Morphus table. Add characteristic rows from the book.

entries.name: Clown Nose
entries.description: The character has a small, brightly colored rubber ball over the tip of the nose which honks when squeezed. Unlike a normal clown nose, this one is a part of the 'Bane and cannot be removed.
customOneOffs: +10% bonus to follow blood or chemical scents.
If the character honks the nose while smiling or behaving in a silly manner, those who see him are temporarily unaffected by his Horror Factor.
Grants a base Charm/Impress of 35% (or +10% if P.B. offers higher), doubling (+20%) when dealing with children under the age of thirteen.

entries.name: Face Paint
entries.description: The Morphus of the Nightbane has a white face painted in classic clown patterns in a riot of garish colors. Can be silly, friendly, happy, sad, or frightening.
customOneOffs: Mold Face (Special): Can morph face to look like another humanoid, monster, or specific person in 1D4 melee rounds, perfectly imitating their voice.

entries.name: Clown Clothes
entries.description: The clothing that appears on this Nightbane is garishly colored and may be baggy and oversized. Attire ranges from overalls to jester outfits or a suit and tie.
customOneOffs: Nobody can remember the clown's face. They can describe his clothing, but his face is a blank and it is blurred out in photographs, video, and film.
Skills like Seduction and Undercover Ops are impossible while in this Morphus.

entries.name: Clown Shoes
entries.description: The character's Morphus is wearing brightly colored shoes that are roughly twice the normal size.
customOneOffs: Impervious to damage from falls and impact from large objects (e.g. falling safe, car, boulder).
Punches, bullets, and melee weapons do full damage.
Cannot leap/jump.

entries.name: Outrageous Hair and Head
entries.description: Wild hair that could be a mohawk, spikes, or a giant afro. And the head is completely REMOVABLE! Usually done for shock value and to create fear or panic.
customOneOffs: The head is impervious to physical damage! Bullets bounce off, blows hurt but do no damage, and the clown cannot be knocked out.
+2 to Horror Factor when the head is visibly detached.
The head holds the brains and consciousness of the Nightbane, and it still controls the body even when detached.
If the head or body is stolen and taken more than 120 feet away, forces the Nightbane to switch to Facade to reunite.

entries.name: Balloons
entries.description: 2D4+3 medium-sized helium balloons of various colors are tied to this Morphus on strings.
customOneOffs: Balloons have 1 S.D.C. each and regenerate at the rate of one every hour.
As long as one balloon is attached, the Nightbane floats down from any height, taking only 1D6 damage (double damage from heights greater than 200 feet).
When separated, each balloon acts as a supernatural decoy, registering to supernatural senses as the Nightbane for 1 hour.
Tailing, Disguise, and Undercover Ops are impossible.

entries.name: Clown Gags
entries.description: Part and parcel of almost any clown act are the gimmicks and gags used to garner laughs. The Nightbane manifests 1D4+1 unique gags.

gimmickInventory.effectFormula: Animates to bite opponents (1D6+1 to 2D6+2 damage). +3 strike, +5 dodge.
Deals 1D4 damage. 20ft radius explosion causes deafness (-1 attack, -2 init for 1D4 rounds).
Melee punch with 7ft reach. Variable damage: 1, 1D6, 2D6, or 4D6.
Detaches to grapple/distract or crawls at Spd 7. +2 to dodge, 3 attacks/melee.
Once per melee, blasts a 10ft foghorn knocking down human-sized targets (Save 14 or lose init and 1 attack).
Squirt water (1D6 to vampires). Spend 1 HP to squirt blood, acid (2D6 to metal), kerosene, or mace.

customOneOffs: -15% to Invoke Trust/Intimidate.

entries.name: Jester's Cap and Costume
entries.description: The Morphus is a jester with a multi-pointed cap featuring bells, charms, spikes, or bones.
customOneOffs: +5% to any single Espionage skill and any single Rogue skill (player choice).

entries.name: Scepter/Baton or Bowling Pin
entries.description: A short staff, ornate rod, or bowling pin that the Nightbane juggles and spins.
customOneOffs: +1 attack when using ONLY this item in combat for the entire melee round.
+1 to strike in HTH or thrown, and +2 to parry and pull punch with the item.

entries.name: Jack-in-the-Box
entries.description: Humanoid upper body atop a giant coiled spring attached to a decorative circus box. The Nightbane controls when it pops out.
customOneOffs: +2 to Horror Factor ONLY on the first melee round the Nightbane 'pops out'.
Surprise attack occurs on a Natural 19 or 20, inflicting double damage.
Coil jumps propel the Nightbane 1.5 feet per point of P.S., permitting power strikes without using two attacks.
Acrobatics, Prowl, Running, Tailing, Undercover Ops, and Driving are impossible.
